evidence.content: A post claims a 'double tap' strike on an Iranian bridge, hitting emergency responders and civilians.
The alleged 'double tap' strike on an Iranian bridge raises questions about adherence to international legal frameworks and accountability.
A comment suggests AI's threat is not destroying truth, but making people doubt it, reflecting strategic narrative construction.
The comment on Grok AI raises concerns about the ethical implications of AI impacting trust and the perception of truth.
The notion that AI can make people doubt the truth points to the spread of unverified claims and emotional appeals.
